available_dialects.label: Nobiin
available_dialects.notes: Most widely spoken Nile Nubian variety (Sudan/Egypt). All current recordings.

available_dialects.label: Kenzi (Mattokki)
available_dialects.notes: Northern Nile Nubian. No recordings yet.

available_dialects.label: Dongolawi (Andaandi)
available_dialects.notes: Southern Nile Nubian. No recordings yet.

license_summary: Recordings sourced from napata.org's Nubian Language CD (2006). Used here for educational/non-commercial purposes; replace with permissioned content for production use.

recordings.notes: Synthetic high-clarity English-voice rendering of the Nobiin romanization. Each letter is enunciated for full pronunciation. NOT the napata speaker; replace with native-speaker recordings when available.
